use_cases: Hero section background with animated, interactive petal patterns
Decorative full-screen visual for landing pages and creative portfolios
Placeholder or loading animation with organic flowing aesthetics
Interactive art component for creative tool applications
Ambient background visualization for media and entertainment platforms
ai_summary: An immersive Three.js shader component that generates organic, flower-like petal patterns through procedural GLSL animation. Features smooth radial gradients transitioning between pink and blue tones, continuous time-based flowing motion, and interactive mouse-responsive bloom effects. The full-screen canvas adapts to any viewport, making it ideal for hero sections, decorative backgrounds, or ambient visual elements in creative and media applications.
